description: 144 - 23-03-2025 - Email from Peter Mandelson to Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

participants.name: Email from Peter Mandelson to Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary for Foreign Affairs

text:
Permanent Under-Secretary for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

From: Peter Mandelson|/ Personal
Sent: Sun 23/03/2025 1:35:01 PM (UTC)

To: Oliver Robbins| Personal ]
Subject: sv

Many thanks for sight of your draft.

I recount this simply to explain how things are here so I am relieved by your advice. Thank you.

wee

Fingers crossed for the Audience.
Thanks again
Peter

Get Outlook for iOS

430
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
